title: vicia angustifolia var. minor
intro: Vicia angustifolia var. minor, also known as narrowleaf vetch or narrow-leaved vetch, is a type of flowering plant in the legume family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which contribute to its health benefits such as reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of health conditions. Additionally, Vicia angustifolia var. minor has been traditionally used to aid in digestion and relieve symptoms of colds and flu.
